function_declarations.description:
Analyzes a resume from plain text input and extracts structured data
    including skills, experience, education, and career level.

    Args:
        resume_text: The plain text content of the user's resume.

    Returns:
        A JSON string with name, skills, experience, education, career level, etc.
function_declarations.name: live_analyze_resume

function_declarations.description:
Analyzes a resume from an uploaded file (PDF or image) using vision.

    Args:
        file_base64: Base64-encoded string of the resume file.
        mime_type: MIME type of the file, e.g. "application/pdf" or "image/png".

    Returns:
        A JSON string with name, skills, experience, education, career level, etc.
function_declarations.name: live_analyze_resume_vision

function_declarations.description:
Compares the user's current skills against the requirements for a target role.

    Args:
        current_skills_csv: Comma-separated list of the user's current skills.
        target_role: The job title or role the user is targeting.
        location: Optional geographic location for salary/market context.
        user_profile_json: JSON string of user profile data for personalised analysis.

    Returns:
        A JSON string with required_skills, missing_skills, match_percentage, etc.
function_declarations.name: live_analyze_skill_gap

function_declarations.description:
Searches the live job market for salary data, demand trends,
    top employers, and hiring insights for a given role and location.

    Args:
        role: The job title to research (e.g. "Product Marketing Manager").
        location: Geographic location for market context.
        user_profile_json: JSON string of user profile data for personalised results.

    Returns:
        A JSON string with salary data, demand trends, top employers, etc.
function_declarations.name: live_search_job_market

function_declarations.description:
Generates a personalised career roadmap with short-term tactics and long-term vision.

    Args:
        profile_json: JSON string of the user's profile.
        target_role: The target role for the career transition.
        skill_gaps_csv: Comma-separated list of skills the user needs to learn.
        timeline_months: Number of months for the roadmap (as a string).
        preferences: Any additional preference text.
        user_profile_json: JSON string of user profile data.

    Returns:
        A JSON string with phased career roadmap, milestones, and action items.
function_declarations.name: live_generate_career_roadmap

function_declarations.description:
Finds the best learning resources for each priority skill gap.

    Args:
        skill_gaps_csv: Comma-separated list of skills to find courses for.
        learning_style: Preferred format — "video", "text", or "interactive".
        user_profile_json: JSON string of user profile data.

    Returns:
        A JSON string mapping each skill name to its curated resource list.
function_declarations.name: live_find_courses

function_declarations.description:
Generates a professional PDF career roadmap report.

    Args:
        career_data_json: JSON string containing the career plan data.
        user_name: The user's name for the report.

    Returns:
        A base64-encoded PDF string.
function_declarations.name: live_generate_pdf_report
